ogTitle: Hassall Grove vs Hassans Walls: Climate Safety

heading: Hassall Grove vs Hassans Walls — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hassall Grove, New South Wales and Hassans Walls, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hassans Walls has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hassall Grove (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hassall Grove or Hassans Walls safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hassall Grove has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Hassans Walls scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hassall Grove scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Hassans Walls scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hassall Grove or Hassans Walls?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hassans Walls has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
